caption: A smiling man wearing a green baseball cap, black over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt sits in front of a professional microphone. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER" and "SHIT" in white lettering. He is positioned in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. To the right of the man, clothing racks are visible. On-screen logos appear in the bottom corners, including one that says "BODILY" and another that reads "DNR". Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a joyful expression, laughing and shifting his gaze slightly while remaining seated in the same position. The background remains static, with no changes to the environment or the presence of other people, as the man's facial expression evolves through a series of laughs.
